{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322032855F290EE69E5CA6960386F"}"},"total":20},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610002508556747544","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文笔细腻人设惊艳，团宠之下藏着极致偏爱与忠诚！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771844170,"group_id":"7470985626720947225","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1FncHMNNjIDqIXz7KKE2+8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"588962402934120","user_name":"呜呜呜呜勇勇"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"588962402934120","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7470985626720947225","book_info":{"abstract":"【1vn➕男全洁➕纯恶女➕无脑爽➕玛丽苏➕团宠➕架空时代】
纪书凝，瑟兰王国谁都不敢惹的存在，生来就是被捧在宇宙中心娇养的大小姐。

她有四座不可逾越的靠山——权柄滔天的大哥执掌军政，富可敌国的二哥垄断商界，医毒双绝的三哥掌控生死，顶流影帝的四哥玩弄人心。

整个王国都知道，得罪纪家，或许还有一线生机；惹了纪檀宁，便是永坠地狱。

她被宠得无法无天，偏执、病娇、占有欲成瘾，自私到了理所当然的地步。

世间一切美好，都该是她的。

她尤其爱收集“真心”

男人们为她疯，为她魔，为她尊严尽碎，却依旧前赴后继，渴望成为她裙下最特别的囚徒。

她的游戏规则很简单：我腻了，你就得消失。

他们都知道她是染了蜜糖的毒药，沾之即瘾，无药可解。

却依旧甘之如饴，俯首称臣。

只因她是纪书凝——这人间，独一无二、横行无忌的偏爱本身。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/10faaaa12a1cde144de4e55297ec32d5~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"慕桃朵朵","author_id":"","book_id":"7470985626720947225","book_name":"顶级大小姐和她的舔狗团","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2773人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":748,"name":"豪门总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=748&name=豪门总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":29,"name":"总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=29&name=总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":4,"name":"校园","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=4&name=校园&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":94,"name":"团宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=94&name=团宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":473,"name":"豪门世家","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=473&name=豪门世家&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":387,"name":"青梅竹马","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=387&name=青梅竹马&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":380,"name":"病娇","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=380&name=病娇&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":519,"name":"大小姐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=519&name=大小姐&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7527686535919977022","read_count":"2773","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"351972"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"183","tags":"豪门总裁,现代言情,豪门世家,校园,青梅竹马,总裁,无脑爽,团宠,病娇,大小姐","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic
